name: 1000 Princes: Born to Love You
short_description: 1000 Princes is a female-oriented 3D visual novel otome game.A fracture in your timeline has caused all your prince husbands—spanning past, present and future from different settings—to time-travel to your current era. Now1,000 princes coexist on your shared timeline, protecting and adoring you.
detailed_description:
[Game Background]

"1000 Princes" is a female-oriented 3D visual novel otome game currently in development. This is the first installment of the “1000 Princes” series. It has now been fully updated and is the ★complete version★.

Q1: Why are there 1,000 princes by your side?

You’re an ordinary girl who happens to rescue a pink pig one day. However, this pig is actually a pet from a higher-dimensional cosmic time management bureau. It was locked in a server room, fainted from hunger, and ended up chewing on cables to survive. Unfortunately, it bit through your timeline, causing chaos in your time clock's magnetic field. As a result, all your prince husbands from past lives, the present, and future timelines have time-traveled to the era where you now reside. You suddenly find yourself surrounded by every husband you've ever had—at the same time!Your prince husbands come from various periods in human history, spanning ancient times, the modern era, the present, and the future. Some hail from domestic lands, others from foreign countries, some from the living world, and others from the underworld. Among them are a primitive man from the Stone Age, a fire and water general from ancient times, an arms dealer from the modern era, a power company CEO from the present day, an alien from the future planet Bike Star, and even a ghost king from the underworld. They represent different times and professions, yet all 1,000 princes are handsome, wealthy, and devoted to you with tender affection.

Q2: What happens on this shared timeline?

On this shared timeline, you and your 1,000 princes will face countless unbelievable challenges and dangers. Together, you’ll solve puzzles, embark on adventures, and overcome hardships. Through these experiences, you’ll grow closer, communicate, and support one another. The princes will protect and cherish you, saving you from various predicaments while vying to bring you to their individual timelines. However, issues arise on this crowded shared timeline—such as identity conflicts and the enormous group of men attracting police and media attention.

Q3: What is the goal of the 1,000 princes?

Higher-dimensional controllers understand that a soul’s long journey through reincarnation can be rewound, replayed, or fast-forwarded like a video. However, they do not want low-dimensional humans on Earth to uncover the secrets of time and space. The pink pig’s escape has jeopardized these secrets, putting you in danger of assassination. The 1,000 princes have one mission: to protect you from being killed. Guarding you, cherishing you, and loving you is their shared duty. You are the center of their world, their precious treasure!

However, the assassins from the higher dimension can take on countless forms and identities, launching relentless attacks against you. The 1,000 princes will do everything in their power to keep you safe. Escaping to a specific prince’s individual timeline is a way to hide from danger. So, who will you choose as your one true love?

Q4: Where and when are you currently?

You are currently a citizen of Fang Kingdom, living in Fang Kingdom. Fang Kingdom is a new nation established after World War III, located on a newly formed square-shaped landmass created by tectonic movements. It is a free, equal, and inclusive country that blends various ethnicities and languages. The people of Fang Kingdom are naturally romantic and passionate about love!

After World War III, a new international order and global structure were established, and Fang Kingdom maintains good and close diplomatic relations with emerging nations like Fish Kingdom, Chicken Kingdom, Turtle Kingdom, Rabbit Kingdom, Dragon Kingdom, and others. The post-war new world is filled with love, sweetness, and romance.

[Game Content & Features]

1 Common Route Storyline

The first Team Romance, "Elevator Love Rescue", features a debut lineup of 10 princes arriving in your timeline for the first time, offering a sweet story filled with both thrills and romance. In the common route, you can experience stunning visuals and an engaging storyline while solving puzzles, collecting items, and escaping challenging situations. In the future, more Team Romances will be continuously updated, with the prince team doing their utmost to protect and love you...

2 Individual Route Storyline

Currently, a preview and demo of the individual route for the first prince, Ling Tian, are available. Prince Ling Tian already has a standalone game. In the future, more individual routes for the other princes will be added. In this section, you can explore each prince's profile and preview or try out parts of their individual routes.

3 Songs

Unlock new songs as you progress. Shared timeline themes are sung by all the princes, while individual routes feature solo performances by each prince.

4.Mini-Games

Enjoy various mini-games related to the 1,000 princes’ world.

5.Group Chat

Engage in group chats with the princes via a mobile app, track their social media updates, and discover vital clues for puzzles.

6.Library Files

Read daily news featuring the princes, access their diaries, and gather information from various documents.

7.Lucky Draw

8.Prince Album

View photos and memories of your time with the princes.

Debut Prince Roster

◆ You Once an architect, you're now preparing to reopen the small cafeteria your parents left behind. You never expected all your husbands would converge into the same timeline.

◆ Bang (Caveman) From the Stone Age, tall and strong, his love for you is pure and untainted by modern industry.

◆ Yu Cheng (Programmer) Unruly and straightforward, he's a master of offensive coding. When your electric car lost its brakes, he hacked into the traffic system to turn all lights green and saved you.

◆ HaoWei (Bear Nation Warlord) Nicknamed Brown Bear, he is a cold yet gentle warlord. Tough on the outside, all his tenderness is reserved for you.

◆ Ling Tian (Fang Nation Prince) An Asian military school student, handsome, gentle, and loyal. The royal family holds a bride-seeking campaign to divert public attention, but he only sees you.

◆ Citan (Baike Alien) A human-alien hybrid from the highly advanced and rational Baike planet. Though his kind avoids emotions, he chooses to retain his feelings for you.

◆ Congwei (Electric CEO) CEO of Quark Electric, deeply in love with you. In his timeline, both of you are affected by electric radiation — you turn into a human power bank, and he needs your body to stay alive.

◆ Mo Mo (Bear Nation Detective) Nicknamed Black Bear, he's a calm and intelligent criminal detective. He often meets you at crime scenes and falls in love while interviewing you as a witness.

◆ YuuJin (Fish Nation Prince) Smart, hardworking, and humble — a mechanical engineer. In his timeline, you are his secretary and translator.

◆ Yong Mi (Water General of Ji Nation) An ancient water general who can manipulate water, steam, and ice. He often makes rainbows for you to cheer you up.

◆ Shen Jun (Fire General of Ji Nation) An ancient fire general who manipulates fire. He uses fireworks to comfort and encourage you.

◆ Ming Zun (Judge) A former underworld judge who reincarnated into the human world out of love for you, now serving as a mortal court judge.

◆Ze Xian（Pearl Prince）  Ze Xian says to you: “When I discovered you, it felt like finding the most precious and crystal-clear pearl in the world. I just want to place you inside my sturdy pearl shell and protect you well!”

[🌟 1000 Princes Series]
The “1000 Princes” series focuses on learning Chinese.
It includes the Learn Chinese with 1000 Princes website, e-books, otome games, and videos developed by 琴研 Ginyan.

🎮 Otome Games | STEAM, Google Play
📖 E-books | Google Play Books
🎬 Videos | YouTube “LEARN CHINESE 1000PRINCES”
💻 Official Website | On the website, you can learn Chinese in depth through the vlogs of the 1000 Princes.
It features multiple sections such as dialogues, vocabulary, grammar, exercises, listening, reading, tests, writing, AI Princes, and more—helping you comprehensively improve your Chinese proficiency! 😄

⚠️ Important Notice

  • The game uses a large amount of AI, including AI-generated images, AI voiceovers, and AI music.

  • All story content is adapted from novels written by the developer Ginyan.

  • This is an otome visual novel game with simple player controls.

▌About the Developer

Ginyan, I am an independent otome game developer as well as an e-book author and online tutor. I teach and create foreign language learning ebooks. I am passionate about computers and languages. Using the romance novels I write as the basis for my game scripts, I taught myself the Unity game engine and Naninovel, developing the game on my own with the help of various AI tools.

supported_languages:
English, Traditional Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese*, Thai, Turkish, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support
